primary_composite.source: AACT NCT02540993 outcome_id=211467440 analysis_id=105626173 (CV composite HR 0.860, 95% CI 0.747-0.989, p=0.0339; Log Rank; stratified Cox model); PMID:33264825 (Bakris NEJM 2020); note: whole-trial CV composite used as DFS HF-subgroup primary anchor — HF-subgroup-specific HR from PMID:33198491 (Filippatos Circulation 2021) not separately reported in AACT

acm.source: AACT NCT02540993 outcome_id=211467441 analysis_id=105626174 (ACM HR 0.895, 95% CI 0.746-1.075, p=0.2348; Log Rank; stratified Cox model); PMID:33264825 (Bakris NEJM 2020); whole-trial value — HF subgroup ACM not separately reported in AACT

cv_death.source: Derived (assumption: CV death HR approximated at 0.86 matching CV composite; PMID:33198491 (Filippatos Circulation 2021) HF subgroup analysis does not separately report CV death CI; AACT NCT02540993 does not separately report CV death; baseline_prop 0.60 typical CV fraction; placeholder for clinician review)

non_cv_death.source: Derived from conservation law: non_cv HR = (ACM_HR - 0.60 x CV_death_HR) / 0.40 approx 0.96; CI approximate; PMID:33198491 does not report non-CV death separately; AACT NCT02540993 does not separately report non-CV death; placeholder for clinician review

delta_k.source: Derived (assumption: finerenone delta-K ~+0.23 mmol/L at lower eGFR (44 mL/min); extrapolated from FIDELIO-DKD overall population; PMID:33264825; AACT NCT02540993 baseline_measurements does not report serum potassium change; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_sbp.source: Derived (assumption: ~2 mmHg SBP reduction; PMID:33264825 supplementary; AACT NCT02540993 baseline_measurements does not report SBP change; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_egfr.source: Derived (assumption: acute eGFR dip larger at lower baseline eGFR; PMID:33264825; AACT NCT02540993 baseline_measurements does not report delta-eGFR; placeholder for clinician review)
